Tollywood Blockbusters

01
🎥 Telugu · 2019
Dear Comrade
A Powerful Love Story with Anger and Ideals
Genre: Romantic Drama Director: Bharat Kamma Cast: Vijay Deverakonda, Rashmika Mandanna Language: Telugu

Bobby — a student leader battling anger issues — falls in love with Lilly, a calm and composed state-level cricketer. Their romance unfolds through emotional highs and painful conflicts, making this film deeply relatable, raw, and unforgettable.

🔗 Watch on YouTube
02
🔥 Kannada · 2018
KGF: Chapter 1
Rise of a Monster — Kolar Gold Fields
Genre: Action, Period Drama Director: Prashanth Neel Cast: Yash, Srinidhi Shetty Language: Kannada

Rocky — born into poverty — rises through violence and sheer will to become the most feared name in the Kolar Gold Fields. Set across the 1950s–1980s, this iconic film blends raw action with a powerful mother–son bond, turning Rocky into a modern cinematic legend.

03
🌾 Telugu · 2019
Maharshi
A Film About Farmers, Roots & Responsibility
Genre: Action, Drama Director: Vamshi Paidipally Cast: Mahesh Babu, Pooja Hegde Language: Telugu

Rishi — a wildly successful CEO — returns to his roots and fights for the welfare of Indian farmers and rural communities. The film beautifully blends commercial entertainment with a heartfelt social message about agriculture, village life, and giving back.

🔗 Watch on YouTube
